base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_oak_stake — a pickup_item from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Oak Stake — required for final-battle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Oak Stake — required for final-battle; destroys Dracula's crystals
